title: ClientCertAuth listed in architecture doc but absent from source
description: CLAUDE.md §Architecture lists ClientCertAuth as a provided auth variant in auth.rs, but it is not implemented. auth.rs has NoneAuth, BearerAuth, BasicAuth, CustomCaAuth — no ClientCertAuth. A contributor reading the architecture doc to understand what auth options exist will look for ClientCertAuth and find nothing. Either implement it or remove it from the architecture doc so the doc matches the code.
